titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Campus Ministry Advancement Records
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Jeffrey Coutts and Martha Lund Smalley

controlnote.p: This finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: finding aid prepared according to local divinity library descriptive practices.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 13, 2020 at 23:18

did.unittitle: Campus Ministry Advancement Records
did.abstract: This collection documents the history and operations of Campus Ministry Advancement, an organization incorporated in Ohio in 1967 to support Christian ministries in higher education. Legal documents, minutes, correspondence, financial records, and tax records are included.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of Campus Ministry Advancement, Inc. 2014.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Campus Ministry Advancement Records (RG 259), Special Collections, Yale Divinity School Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Campus Ministry Advancement (CMA) was founded by Reverend John W. Miller in 1954 as a non-profit organization. Based in Columbus, Ohio, it became incorporated in 1967. The organization was established to support Christian ministries in higher education. CMA provided grants related to support for persons engaged in Christian ministry in post secondary education and organized training events for skills in development and fundraising for staff and boards of such ministries. CMA was organized to "teach, promote, and advance the Christian religion among residents and citizens of the U.S.A. and especially among the youth."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes documents related to the establishment of the organization, minutes, correspondence about the program, and financial and tax records. Series I contains organizational records dating from 1967 to 2007. Documents in this series include legal and historical documents including Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations and minutes from Board of Trustees and Membership meetings. Series II contains correspondence dating from 1967 to 2007. Documents included are letters to and from Director John Miller, letters to and from Director Carolyn Miller, and letters to and from President Robert Epps. The correspondence deals with administrative matters, grant requests, fundraising seminars, and conferences. Series III contains contains financial records dating from 1967 to 2009. Documents include bank and investment records, financial reports, budgets, treasurer's reports, and records of disbursed grants. Series IV contains tax records dating from 1969 to 2009. Included within this series are correspondence with the Internal Revenue Service, 990 forms, and correspondence with attorneys.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Organizational Records
Legal and historical documents
Articles of Incorporation; Amendments to Articles of Incorporation; Registration as Charitable Trust
Code of Regulations
"Background Information Concerning Campus Ministry Advancement, Inc." by Jon and Carolyn Miller; Will of and information about benefactor Margaret J. Davis; historical statement by Carolyn Miller
Statements regarding purpose and program of organization; lists of members of Board of Trustees
Minutes and Reports
Minutes of organizational meeting
Minutes of Board of Trustees meetings and records of "Action without Meeting"
Minutes of Board of Trustees meetings and records of "Action without Meeting"; agenda for conference call
Minutes of Annual Meeting of Members
Programs and fundraising
Fund-raising training events; article by Robert Epps
Grant criteria, papers from "Conversation on Ministry in Higher Education" convened by Ohio Synod of Presbyterian Church, collected material re. ministry in higher education
Correspondence
Letters to/from Director John Miller, regarding establishing Articles of Incorporation, staffing information
Letters to/from Director Carolyn Miller, regarding grant requests, reporting to Trust Officer, adminstrative matters
Letters to/from Director Carolyn Miller, regarding grant requests, fund-raising seminars, administrative matters
Letters to/from Director Carolyn Miller, regarding grant requests, fund-raising seminars, administrative matters
Letters to/from Director Carolyn Miller, regarding grant requests, fund-raising seminars, administrative matters
Letters to/from Carolyn Miller and President Robert Epps, regarding administrative matters, scholarship and grant requests, programs
Letters to/from President Robert Epps, regarding administrative matters, scholarship and grant requests, programs
Letters to/from President Robert Epps, regarding donations and grant requests, adminstrative matters
Letters to/from President Robert Epps, regarding donations and grant requests, adminstrative matters
Letters to/from President Robert Epps, regarding donations and grant requests, adminstrative matters, participation in Global Multifaith Conference, Vancouver
Letters to/from President Robert Epps, regarding donations to Carolyn Miller Memorial, grant requests, adminstrative matters, programs
Letters to/from President Robert Epps grant requests, reimbursements, adminstrative matters, report to Board
Financial Records
Financial ledger sheets
Treasurer's reports, records of grants disbursed
Treasurer's reports, records of grants disbursed
Financial reports, budgets
Financial reports, budgets
Bank and investment records
Bank and investment records
Bank and investment records
Bank and investment records
Tax Records
990 forms, correspondence with Internal Revenue Service
990 forms, correspondence with Internal Revenue Service
990 forms, correspondence with Internal Revenue Service, attorneys
990 forms, correspondence with Internal Revenue Service, attorneys
990 forms, correspondence with Internal Revenue Service, attorneys, bank regarding charitable status
990 forms, correspondence
990 forms, correspondence
990 forms, correspondence
990 forms, correspondence
Addendum - 2018
Legal documents
Legal documents and correspondence
Minutes and documents from meetings of Board and Members
Regarding dissolution of Campus Ministry Advancement organization and dispersal of remaining funds
Program documentation
Financial records
Tax records
Miscellaneous documents and correspondence (on USB drive)
